question: Is the image presented in a panoramic (wide) format?
Is the image clearly split down the middle into two distinct halves?
Is the left half of the image rendered in a neon-lit vaporwave cyberpunk style?
Does the left half feature glowing grids characteristic of the specified style?
Is the right half of the image rendered in a soft watercolor style depicting a pastoral countryside?
Does the right half exhibit watercolor textures (e.g., soft edges, washes) distinct from the crispness of the left half?
Is the sky rendered in a Fauvist style with unnaturally vibrant orange and green colors?
Does the Fauvist-style sky span continuously across both the left and right halves?
Is there a vintage car in the foreground rendered in a photorealistic style?
Is there a twisted old tree rendered in an Expressionist style?
Is there a white bird in the sky rendered in a minimalist flat-design style?
Are the distinct styles (Cyberpunk, Watercolor, Fauvist, Photorealistic, Expressionist, Minimalist) clearly distinguishable from one another?
